title: Los Alamos Landscaping & More
text: We had LA Landscaping replace the fence on two sides of our backyard. They did a fantastic job and we are really pleased with the results. The workers are great. They are polite and professional and always do a thorough clean up after the work is done. My mother-in-law has also used them for sprinkler system installation, maintenance, and repair as well as yard cleanup. We have always had great service. It gives me a great deal of peace of mind knowing that whatever they do, it will be a quality job.

title: Los Alamos Landscaping & More
text: Los Alamos Landscaping repaired my fence.   They gave me a good estimate, showed up when they said they would, and were prompt in finishing the work.  Javeir did a great job and made sure we knew what was occurring.  Overall, we were very happy and satisfied.

title: Los Alamos Landscaping & More
text: Throughout our time here we have used Los Alamos Landscaping many, many times. They are prompt, considerate, and they know what they are doing. From start to finish we are pleased with all that they have done. Their employees go above and beyond to the customers, and they are a great company to do business with. Our elderly neighbor has them do her lawn maintenance and multiple times I have seen the employees bring out her trashcan to the cub and bring it back. Its the little things that make a company great! Keep up the good work! Highly recommend them!

title: Los Alamos Landscaping & More
text: We are super pleased with the work of Los Alamos Landscaping and More on a project to turn a feral part of our yard into a beautifully landscaped driveway/van-port.  LA Landscaping navigated the challenges of the LA County permitting process and, when work started, swiftly worked to completion.  LA Landscaping was very responsive to a change in scope that we requested in the middle of construction and we are extremely pleased with the results.  We can highly recommend LA Landscaping for your project.

title: Los Alamos Landscaping & More
text: David went above and beyond to help us solve a backyard sprinkler leak issue. He was direct, polite, and fixed the leak in no time. While here, David also helped me better understand the DIY sprinkler system installed by previous owners and gave great recommendations on how to improve the wiring issues in the current system. I feel confident knowing Los Alamos Landscaping can help us out in the future. Great experience overall!
responseFromOwnerText: Thank you so much for your review. We are very happy that we were able to help you. :)

title: Los Alamos Landscaping & More
text: We have hired Los Alamos Landscaping & More multiple times and will continue to hire them for all of our future needs. They are incredibly hard working, professional, respectful, kind, and thorough. They are experts in their field and their work is beautiful. The care they put into their work, and employees, shines through in all that they do. Definitely the best there is.
responseFromOwnerText: Thank you so much for your review! We appreciate the opportunity to serve you. :)

title: Los Alamos Landscaping & More
text:
We recently worked with LA Landscaping for a large (at least to us) job in our backyard to reconfigure the locations of our sprinkler system heads, install a concrete pad for a shed and create a gravel and concrete pads path to the shed. The team worked quickly to get the concrete before the freezing weather came in. The end result is fantastic & exactly what we were looking for.

This spring (2023), we worked with LA Landscaping to start our sprinkler system for the year. David came out as scheduled and got the system ready to go. In the process, David identified a couple issues with the system, informed us of the issues and cost to correct them and fixed them on the spot. All the time he was smiling and jovial. We really appreciated his hard work and great attitude.

title: Los Alamos Landscaping & More
text: I used Los Alamos Landscaping for both yard maintenance and a renewal of my irrigation system. They provided great service for both. Despite all the trenching and digging they had to do to install new sprinklers, the yard looked like nothing had changed after they were done (except, now, the sprinklers work and water the yard efficiently)
responseFromOwnerText: Thank you Pierre-Yves! We appreciate your feedback and are happy to have been able to meet your needs! :)

title: Los Alamos Landscaping & More
text: Craig, Rachel, and their team are fantastic! As far as landscaping goes, they know what works in northern New Mexico and how to pull everything together beautifully. They are efficient, reliable, and dedicated to working with their clients. Their renovation work is inspiring and Craig has such a great mind for seeing potential in the most challenging of spaces. Above all, they are honest, kind people who take great pride in a job well done. Highly recommended!

title: Los Alamos Landscaping & More
text: I am always impressed with the attention to detail and quality work Los Alamos Landscaping has provided in my residence. I will continue using them. The staff is pleasant, attentive, clean and my neighbors always tell me how nice they were to them as well. That is a plus!

title: Los Alamos Landscaping & More
text: Los Alamos Lanscape & More installed our sprinkler and drip irrigation system. The system has worked great for several years. We enjoyed the kind workers, prompt service and quality work. I highly recommend this company!

title: Los Alamos Landscaping & More
text: I am very pleased with the work of LA Landscaping.    They did a phenomenal job and they were super nice to deal with .  They will be the 1st place I call for any additional work I might have.

title: Los Alamos Landscaping & More
text: Anyone else have a small problem and had no clue where to find help?  I just made a comment about some repairs on my patio, and the next week, the new pieces were installed.  The men worked quickly and did a great job of cleaning up the area.

title: Los Alamos Landscaping & More
text: Craig and his team always find a way to get it done! I have worked with Craig several times, and every time I have been impressed with the work. His team is professional, polite, and are very communicative about what to expect.

title: Los Alamos Landscaping & More
text: Professional and prompt. Los Alamos landscaping creates personalized beautiful work at reasonable rates. The owners are personable, kind and really go the extra mile to ensure satisfaction.

title: Los Alamos Landscaping & More
text:
Beautiful results from this company. Great people to do business with.  We are so pleased with how our year came out.

Kay

title: Los Alamos Landscaping & More
text: Great, the gentleman was able to answer my questions and even directed me to where to find something he didn't have.

title: Los Alamos Landscaping & More
text: I love how beautiful my yard is thanks LA LANDSCAPING.

title: Los Alamos Landscaping & More
text: Best in town

title: Los Alamos Landscaping & More
text: Scheduled an estimate about a week or 2 out and about halfway through my appointment time I emailed and called to see if we were still good for this time. No one ever showed up. 2 days later I got a call from the owner saying they looked at their schedule wrong and wanted to reschedule and said they could do it same day. I checked in when I was home and asked about what time he though, he said he would be there in 20 minutes...40 minutes later I told him not to bother.

title: Los Alamos Landscaping & More
text: After a promising initial meeting, apparently Craig decided we weren't worth his time or energy. After 6 weeks I emailed to follow up on the promised delivery, only to be put off twice. Completely ghosted on us. Very unprofessional. Do not waste your time with this company. I would leave zero stars if I could.

title: Los Alamos Landscaping & More
text: I echo lots of the reviews ... they don't seem interested in work or communicating with customers. Weeks waiting for an estimator visit and then crickets. No estimate provided, phone calls not returned, etc. Don't know what's up with these guys.
responseFromOwnerText: David - we are sorry to hear this.  It can take several weeks to get an estimate scheduled during our busiest time of the year, however we do have an estimate in our system for you.  There must be an issue with our email or phone system, otherwise this would have been provided to you already.  If you are still interested, please call our office at 505-662-6234 and we will verify your information and make sure we get the estimate to you.

title: Los Alamos Landscaping & More
text: Unless you're willing to spend five figures, they're unwilling to work with you.  Don't waste your time if you're the small guy.

title: Los Alamos Landscaping & More
text: Do not even call them, they won't show up.
